events.title: Full Moon & Lion's Gate Celebration with Jeremy Sol
events.description: Jeremy Sol returns to AYMC for his late-summer full moon offering — an evening of Maha Kirtan with Sacred Mantras, Nataraja Ecstatic Dance, Sound Healing, collective mantra, and a closing Fire Ritual under the Lion's Gate full moon. August 8 is one of the most charged dates on the ceremonial calendar: the full moon and the Lion's Gate portal converge, amplifying the Bhakti devotional current Jeremy Sol carries. Expect the full Bhakti Bliss Bali format — live instruments, devotional chanting that escalates into ecstatic movement, a grounding sound journey, and a fire circle to close. At AYMC's open-air shala in Penestanan, Sayan.
events.short_description: Jeremy Sol's Full Moon & Lion's Gate evening at AYMC — Maha Kirtan, Nataraja Ecstatic Dance, Sound Healing, and Fire Ritual on the year's most electrically charged ceremonial date.
events.venue_address: Jl. Penestanan Kelod No. 75, Sayan, Ubud
events.price_info: IDR 300,000 early bird / IDR 350,000 presale / IDR 400,000 door (estimate — confirm at AYMC)

events.title: Crystal & Metal Bowl Fusion
events.description:
Crystal/ metal Tibetan bowls and tubular chimes gently blend with therapeutic world instruments such as Didgeridoo, Zen Flute, Sufi Ney Flute, Kachapi strings, voice (medicine chants in ancient languages), koshi chimes and unplugged guitar to create a spacious rich tapestry of acoustic sounds, and soothing overtones for personal connection, deep relaxation and inner peace.

NOTES:

 If you have any issues with online payments, please email bookings@theyogabarn.com or WhatsApp The Yoga Barn Hotline (+62) 811 3983 789  We're here to help!
 Registration and payment can also be made at The Yoga Barn Reception
 If you see ticket sales are closed for the Event, contact us by WhatsApp to see if there is still space available!
 For special class, workshop and night event, Children under the age of 10 are not permitted to join , there are NO EXCEPTIONS to this rule. Children ages 10-15 must be accompanied by a parent/guardian or sibling that is over 18

 

Refund Policy:

If you are unable to attend this event, you are eligible for a full refund of the ticket price if you contact us at least 24 hours in advance of the published start time. Contact must be made via email to bookings@theyogabarn.com  or in person at The Yoga Barn reception desk. We are NOT able to process refunds for any reason if you contact us less than 24 hours prior to the published start time.  We do not cover reimbursement of any associated booking fees that exceed our published ticket price.

Ticket Transfer:

Tickets are not transferrable to another person. The booking is only valid for the person whose name is printed on this ticket.

Late Arrival:

We recommend that you arrive 15 minutes prior to the start time. If you arrive after the published start time, you may be denied access and your booking will not be refunded.

Cancellation Policy:

If this event is canceled by The Yoga Barn prior to the start time, you are eligible for a refund of your ticket. We do not cover reimbursement of any associated booking fees that exceed our published ticket price. Please be aware that refunds may take up to 30 days.

events.title: Soft Tantric Temple Night
events.description: Join the Sacred Space Temple for their Soft Tantric Temple Night, coming to Ubud from Koh Phangan. This event offers a loving, heart-centered, and community-based temple experience. It includes ceremonial cacao, connection rituals, and free play/soft exploration. The event is sober and aims for gender balance.
events.short_description: Sacred Space brings their Soft Tantric Temple Night to Ubud, featuring cacao, connection rituals, and soft exploration. Sober event.
events.venue_address: At a private luxury pool villa, Ubud, Bali
